personal.name: Ryan Loo Tuck Fatt
personal.title: Full Stack Developer & AI Enthusiast
personal.tagline: Building intelligent, scalable web experiences with modern technology stacks.
personal.bio: I'm a passionate full-stack developer with expertise in building modern web applications, AI integrations, and cloud-native solutions. I thrive on turning complex problems into elegant, user-friendly experiences.

about.summary: Full-stack developer with 6+ years of experience building scalable web applications, AI-powered tools, and developer platforms.
about.bio: I specialize in JavaScript/TypeScript ecosystems, Python for AI/ML pipelines, and cloud infrastructure on AWS/GCP. I'm passionate about the intersection of AI and web development, building tools that leverage LLMs and machine learning to create smarter user experiences.

experience.description: Leading development of cloud-native applications using microservices architecture. Mentoring junior developers and driving technical decisions for scalability and performance.
highlights: Architected and deployed a real-time data pipeline processing 10M+ events/day
Reduced deployment time by 70% with custom CI/CD automation
Led migration from monolith to microservices, improving uptime to 99.9%

experience.description: Built and maintained multiple client-facing web applications. Implemented RESTful APIs and integrated third-party services for enhanced functionality.
highlights: Built a real-time collaboration platform serving 50K+ users
Integrated Stripe payment processing handling $2M+ in transactions
Implemented comprehensive testing suite achieving 95% code coverage

experience.description: Designed and developed responsive user interfaces for various startups. Collaborated with UX designers to create intuitive and accessible web experiences.
highlights: Developed component library used across 5+ client projects
Improved Core Web Vitals scores by 45% through performance optimization
Mentored 3 junior developers through structured onboarding program

projects.title: AI-Powered Analytics Dashboard
projects.description: Real-time data visualization platform with machine learning predictions and automated insights. Features customizable dashboards, anomaly detection, and predictive forecasting.
highlights: Built custom ML pipeline for anomaly detection
Real-time streaming with WebSocket architecture
Interactive D3.js visualizations with 60fps rendering

projects.title: E-Commerce Platform
projects.description: Full-stack marketplace with payment integration, inventory management, and seller dashboard. Supports multi-vendor operations with real-time inventory sync.
highlights: Multi-vendor architecture with role-based access control
Real-time inventory management across 10K+ SKUs
Integrated Stripe Connect for marketplace payments

projects.title: Mobile Fitness Tracker
projects.description: Cross-platform app for workout tracking, nutrition planning, and progress analytics. Features AI-powered workout recommendations and social features.
highlights: AI-powered workout recommendation engine
Real-time sync across devices with offline support
Custom charting library for progress visualization

projects.title: DevOps Automation Suite
projects.description: CI/CD pipeline tools with automated testing, deployment, and monitoring capabilities. Features blue-green deployments, automated rollbacks, and Slack integrations.
highlights: Automated blue-green deployment strategy
Custom monitoring dashboard with real-time alerts
Slack integration for deployment notifications

achievements: Senior thesis on distributed systems optimization
Teaching assistant for Web Development and Algorithms courses
